'''''Andrasta''''' was a [[Firespray-31-class patrol and attack craft/Legends|''Firespray-31''-class patrol and attack craft]] owned and operated by [[Emon Azzameen]].

==History==
Emon used this vessel in every one of his known engagements in space. He flew it during his brother [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace's]] training missions, the [[Raid on Viraxo 54|attack]] on ''[[Viraxo 54]]'', and the [[Battle of Hospital|defense]] of the [[Hospital (XQ2 Platform)|Rebel ''Hospital'']]. When the [[Azzameen family]]'s home base [[Imperialization of Azzameen assets|fell]] to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] authorities, Emon used the ''Andrasta'' to defend his exiled family. He continued to fly this craft even after the family officially joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. A [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancing girl design was painted on the hull above the [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]].<sup>([[:File:Andrastagirl.jpg|1]])</sup>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
